item.title: The Golden Scale: Bling Libra and the Evolving Extortion Economy
item.author: Matt Brady
item.content:encoded: Scattered Lapsus$ Hunters: Organizations, be aware of the effort of this cybercriminal alliance as they target retail and hospitality for extortion.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, October 10th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9650, (Fri, Oct 10th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: When AI Remembers Too Much – Persistent Behaviors in Agents’ Memory
item.author: Jay Chen and Royce Lu
item.content:encoded: Indirect prompt injection can poison long-term AI agent memory, allowing injected instructions to persist and potentially exfiltrate conversation history.

item.title: [Guest Diary] Building Better Defenses: RedTail Observations from a Honeypot, (Thu, Oct 9th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: [This is a Guest Diary by Jin Quan Low, an ISC intern as part of the SANS.edu Bachelor's Degree in Applied Cybersecurity (BACS) program [1].]

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Thursday, October 9th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9648, (Thu, Oct 9th)
